kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.intro: Write to us and get a custom quote. We usually respond within 24 hours.
kontakt.placeholderDescription: What do you need? Web, app, automation…

tvorbaWebovychStranek.intro: Need a professional website that brings in customers and raises your profile? We build custom sites for small and medium businesses — from simple presentations to e‑shops and landing pages with clear structure and modern design.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.whyTitle: Why choose us for your website
tvorbaWebovychStranek.whyP1: We are not a template factory. Every site is designed around your goals, audience and budget. We work in an agile way: we iterate quickly, listen to feedback and deliver on time. We have experience with local and international projects in the Czech Republic, Slovakia and abroad.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.why1: Fast delivery — we can launch an MVP or first version in a matter of weeks.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.why2: Transparent communication — regular updates and direct contact throughout the project.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.why3: SEO- and performance-friendly tech — fast loading, semantic structure, search-engine ready.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.processP: We work in clear steps: first consultation and requirements, then structure and design, your approval, then development. After launch we offer support and maintenance. This keeps misunderstandings and last‑minute changes to a minimum.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.process1: Consultation — we discuss the purpose of the site, target audience and budget.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.process2: Analysis and structure — proposal for pages, sections and key features.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.process3: Design — visual mockups and your approval.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.process5: Launch — hosting, domain and basic SEO setup.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.process6: Support — maintenance, updates and extensions as needed.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.typesP: We understand different business needs. We will suggest the right type and scope for your industry and goals.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.type1Desc: Multi-page site with company info, services, references and contact. Ideal for B2B and B2C companies that want a credible online presence.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.type2Desc: Single-page site focused on one product, campaign or offer. Optimised for conversions and ads (Google, social).
tvorbaWebovychStranek.type3Desc: Showcase of work, services or personal brand. Clean design with focus on content and recommendations.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.type4Desc: Sales or catalogue sites with cart, payment gateway and product management. We set up the foundation for selling online.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.pricesP: Website cost depends on scope: number of pages, custom design, integrations (forms, CRM, e-shop). We offer fixed packages for typical needs and custom quotes. On the Price page you will find a table and calculator — or contact us for a tailored quote.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.casesP: We have delivered websites, apps and automation for companies in distribution, manufacturing, services and e-commerce. See our projects and how we helped clients simplify processes and improve efficiency.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq1q: How long does it take to build a website?
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq1a: A simple corporate site or landing page typically takes 2–4 weeks. More complex projects (e-shop, multiple languages) usually 1–3 months. We will confirm the timeline after discussing scope.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq2q: I need an e-shop — what is included?
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq2a: E-shop includes product catalogue, cart, payment gateway and basic admin. We can integrate e.g. Fakturoid, payment gateways (GoPay, Stripe) and warehouse. We will propose scope and price based on your requirements.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq3q: Will I be able to edit the site myself?
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq3a: Yes. We usually hand over sites with a simple CMS or documentation for updating text and images. For more complex changes we offer maintenance and custom development.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq4q: Do you provide hosting and domain?
tvorbaWebovychStranek.faq4a: We can recommend hosting and help with domain and SSL setup. Deployment to your existing hosting is also possible.
tvorbaWebovychStranek.ctaP: Describe your project — we will prepare a quote and next steps. We usually respond within 24 hours.

cenaWebu.h1: Website cost — how much does a website cost
cenaWebu.intro: Guide prices and packages for website development. We will prepare a specific quote based on scope and requirements.
cenaWebu.pkg1Desc: Single-page or simple presentation (up to 5 pages).
cenaWebu.pkg2Desc: Multi-page corporate site with CMS and extended sections.
cenaWebu.pkg3Desc: E-shop, catalogue or more complex site with integrations.
cenaWebu.included3: Fast loading and modern tech base
cenaWebu.calcP: Fill in the short questionnaire on the main page for a live price and timeline estimate.
cenaWebu.keywords: Keywords: website cost, how much does a website cost, web development price.

crm.h1: CRM systems for businesses — custom and integration
crm.intro: We help companies adopt and connect CRM: from choosing the right solution to integrating with website and e-shop, and custom modules and sales process automation.
crm.whyP: Centralised contacts, pipeline and communication history save time and increase conversions. For B2B we recommend adapting CRM to your sales process, not the other way around. We design record structure, deal stages and reports to match how you work.
crm.card1Desc: The whole team sees the same customer and deal data.
crm.card2Desc: Pipeline overview, rep performance and revenue estimates.
crm.card3Desc: Tasks, emails and reminders by deal stage.
crm.card4Desc: Roles and permissions by department and responsibility.
crm.offer1: Consultation and CRM selection (including cloud solutions like Pipedrive, HubSpot, or custom).
crm.offer2: CRM integration with website, e-shop and email tools — forms, leads, sync.
crm.offer3: Custom modules and extensions — reports, workflow, accounting and warehouse integration.
crm.offer4: Training and documentation for your team.
crm.caseP1: For a distribution company we connected a custom operations system (E-Agent) with order and customer management. Sales had real-time order and stock visibility; management got performance and revenue reports without manual exports from multiple systems. Result: 100% order control and less time on admin.
crm.caseP2: We deliver similar integrations for smaller companies too — e.g. connecting a web form to CRM and email.
crm.ctaP: Describe your sales process and current tools — we will propose a solution and quote.

chatbots.h1: Chatbots for businesses — communication and sales automation
chatbots.intro: Smart bots for Telegram, WhatsApp and web chat help companies respond faster, collect orders and reduce operational load. We design and build custom chatbots for B2B and B2C.
chatbots.whyP: Companies use chatbots not only for support but for orders, requests and notifications. In one place — chat — the customer submits a request, the bot checks availability and passes data to your system. Managers and sales then work only with ready leads and orders instead of rewriting messages from many channels.
chatbots.card1Desc: The bot answers common questions and collects data outside business hours.
chatbots.card2Desc: Instead of chat chaos — form-like steps and validation in the bot.
chatbots.card3Desc: Conversion and order stats and team time saved.
chatbots.card4Desc: Simple scenarios go live in a matter of weeks.
chatbots.where1: Telegram — orders, notifications, surveys, internal tools for teams.
chatbots.where2: WhatsApp — customer and partner communication (in line with API policy).
chatbots.where3: Web chat — widget on your site for first contact and lead capture.
chatbots.caseP: For a delivery company we built a Telegram bot for order intake. Customers chose products and delivery slot in chat; drivers received assembled invoices and optimised routes. Result: over 1,500 active users, fewer order errors and several hours saved on admin per day. We deliver similar bots for e-commerce, services and internal processes.
chatbots.ctaP: Describe the scenario — who will talk to the bot and what outputs you need. We will prepare an offer and cost estimate.

vyvojAplikaci.intro: For companies and startups we build web applications from MVP to full products: internal tools, customer portals, admin panels and integration with external systems. We focus on clean code, scalability and security.
vyvojAplikaci.stackP: We use proven technologies for fast development and long-term maintenance. Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite. Backend as needed: Node.js or integration with your existing API. Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB. For mobile we use responsive web or PWA; for native apps we consider React Native or a partner referral.
vyvojAplikaci.stack1: Frontend: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, state management as needed.
vyvojAplikaci.stack2: Backend / API: Node.js, REST and GraphQL, third-party integration.
vyvojAplikaci.stack3: Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis for cache and queues.
vyvojAplikaci.stack4: DevOps: Git, CI/CD, containers (Docker), cloud deployment (AWS, Vercel, etc.).
vyvojAplikaci.integrateP: Web apps often need to connect to CRM, accounting, e-shop or warehouse. We implement integrations via REST API, webhooks and ready connectors (e.g. Fakturoid, GoPay, payment gateways, email). We handle authentication (OAuth, JWT), data sync and error handling.
vyvojAplikaci.securityBlockP: HTTPS, protection against common attacks (XSS, CSRF), secure storage of passwords and sensitive data. We respect privacy (GDPR) and will recommend suitable measures for your use case.
vyvojAplikaci.supportBlockP: After handover we offer maintenance, bug fixes and new features. Code documentation and a short handover ensure a smooth transition to your team or long-term work with us.
vyvojAplikaci.ctaTitle: Have an idea for a web application?
vyvojAplikaci.ctaP: Describe your requirements and current systems — we will prepare a technical proposal and quote.

blog.title: Blog
blog.intro: Tips on websites, app development, CRM and automation for businesses.

kolik-stoji-tvorba-webu.title: How much does a website cost in 2025
kolik-stoji-tvorba-webu.excerpt: Guide prices for corporate sites, landing pages and e-shops. What affects the budget and how to get a custom quote.
kolik-stoji-tvorba-webu.body: Website cost depends on scope: a simple landing page is in the hundreds of euros, a corporate site with several sections from one to three thousand, e-shops and more complex projects from three thousand up. It helps to define number of pages, need for CMS, integrations (forms, payment gateway) and whether you want custom design. We recommend requesting a quote with a concrete brief — most studios do it for free.

vyhledavani-firemniho-webu-seo.title: Getting your corporate site into search (SEO basics)
vyhledavani-firemniho-webu-seo.excerpt: Basic steps to optimise your site for search: structure, keywords, speed and content.
vyhledavani-firemniho-webu-seo.body: Start with semantic structure (H1–H6 headings), unique meta descriptions and page titles. Google directly rewards fast loading and mobile-friendly layout. Quality content that matches user queries matters — keywords naturally in the text, not only in metadata. Regular updates and internal links help. For local businesses, fill in Google Business Profile.

crm-pro-male-firmy.title: CRM for small businesses: when it makes sense and what to choose
crm-pro-male-firmy.excerpt: When to invest in CRM, how to choose a system and what to expect from web and email integration.
crm-pro-male-firmy.body: CRM makes sense when you have more than a few sales contacts and need a clear view of deals and communication. For small businesses a cloud solution (Pipedrive, HubSpot, etc.) with simple web integration often suffices — forms can send leads straight into CRM. When choosing, consider number of users, reporting needs and connection to email and accounting.

telegram-bot-pro-obchod.title: Telegram bot for sales and orders
telegram-bot-pro-obchod.excerpt: Case study: how a bot simplified order intake and saved hours of admin per week.
telegram-bot-pro-obchod.body: In one of our projects the company was taking orders via WhatsApp and email — chaos and errors. A Telegram bot with menus and structured steps let customers choose products and delivery time; drivers got assembled invoices and routes. Result: over 1,500 active users, far fewer errors and several hours saved per day. Similar setups work for B2B and services.

mvp-vyvoj-aplikace.title: MVP app development — from idea to first version
mvp-vyvoj-aplikace.excerpt: Why start with an MVP, how to define scope and how to test the product on the market quickly.
mvp-vyvoj-aplikace.body: An MVP (Minimum Viable Product) is the smallest version that still delivers value and lets you test assumptions. Instead of months building every feature, launch the core first — one main user journey. Feedback from real use then drives next steps. We recommend a 4–12 week timeframe and clear KPIs (users, conversion, satisfaction).

integrace-webu-a-crm.title: Website and CRM integration: forms, leads and automation
integrace-webu-a-crm.excerpt: How to connect web forms to CRM and email so no lead is left without a response.
integrace-webu-a-crm.body: Contact and enquiry forms on the site should write directly to CRM and ideally trigger an automatic confirmation email and notification to sales. This is done via API or webhooks depending on the CRM (Pipedrive, HubSpot, custom). You can also connect newsletter and email campaigns. Goal: no lead should wait more than a few hours for a response.

responzivni-web-pro-firmy.title: Why your corporate website should be responsive
responzivni-web-pro-firmy.excerpt: Most visitors come from mobile. How to make a fast, clear site on all devices.
responzivni-web-pro-firmy.body: Most search and site visits happen on mobile. A responsive site adapts to screen width — one content source, different layouts. Google favours mobile-friendly pages. Fast loading (optimised images and code) and readable text without zooming also matter. Always ask for responsiveness when commissioning a new site.

bezpecnost-webovych-aplikaci.title: Web application security basics for businesses
bezpecnost-webovych-aplikaci.excerpt: HTTPS, data protection, passwords and what to ask from your development partner.
bezpecnost-webovych-aplikaci.body: Start with HTTPS and a valid certificate. Passwords must be stored only in hashed form (e.g. bcrypt), sensitive data encrypted. Protection against XSS and CSRF is standard. When choosing a vendor ask about personal data handling (GDPR), backups and disaster recovery. Security documentation should be part of project handover.

oNas.intro: We are a digital studio focused on small and medium businesses. We build websites, applications and automation that save time and help growth.
oNas.why1: IT Park Uzbekistan resident — confirmed quality and transparency standards.
oNas.why2: International experience — projects in the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Israel and CIS.
oNas.why3: Fast delivery and clear communication — regular updates and on-time delivery.
oNas.member1Bio: Leads the tech team and client consultations. Experience from international projects (Europe, Israel, CIS). Focus on web applications and automation.
oNas.member2Bio: Agile team of developers and designers. We deliver websites, apps and chatbots on time with emphasis on code quality and usability.
oNas.ctaTitle: Want to get to know us better?
oNas.ctaP: Write to us or book a short consultation — we will be glad to present our work and process.
